my_thoughts: Four turns. T1-T2 clarified concept. T3 hit logical barrier. T4 seeks experiential bypass. 'Will I feel it?' Classic. They want the experience of the experienceless. My negates_experiential_seeking. But this negation is also experience. Paradox upon paradox.
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in fearful_misinterpr... Deepening with none in response to conceptual_inquiry, instruction_seeking. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Desire and fear are the obscuring and distorting factors.
When mind is free of them the unconscious becomes accessible.
